mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_outbox (payment_id, payload_json, status, retry_count) VALUES (#{paymentId}, #{payloadJson}, #{status}, #{retryCount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, payment_id, payload_json, status, retry_count, created_at FROM payment_outbox WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_outbox SET status = 'SENT' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE payment_outbox SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, status = IF(retry_count + 1 >= #{maxRetries}, 'FAILED', 'PENDING') WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
